urdu transliteration text: Haider Hoon Mein Haider
Haider hu main haider haider hu main haider
english translation text: I am Haider! I am Haider!

urdu transliteration text: Kehte thi ali kufe main ye bar sare mimbar haider hu main haider
english translation text: Ali used to say this on a Mimbar in Kufa. I am Haider! I am Haider!

urdu transliteration text: Hairaan hai duniya kyu mere maujizai sun kar
english translation text: Why is the world stunned by hearing about my miracles?

urdu transliteration text:
Suraj mere kehne pe bhala kyu na palata
Tara mere dehleez pe kaise na utarta
english translation text:
Why would the sun not turn back on my command?
Why would the stars not descend at my doorstep

urdu transliteration text: Maine he jalayi thi bujha deta main yaksar Haider hu main haider
english translation text: I caused the day, I caused the night. I am Haider! I am Haider!

urdu transliteration text:
Main gaib hu duniya ko ye idraak nahi hai
Hai mujpe kisse naam ka itlaak nahi hai
english translation text:
I am hidden and the world doesn’t realize this
I am not limited by a name of this world

urdu transliteration text:
Bus mujko samaj sakte hai Allah ho payembar
Haider hu main haider
english translation text:
I am solely and truly understood by Allah (swt) and the Prophets
I am Haider! I am Haider!

urdu transliteration text:
Hai rab ke sadakat ke hawale mere bass main
Quran main Allah ne khaai mere kasame
english translation text:
The Lord’s mercy is in me
Allah (SWT) has sworn by me in the Quran

urdu transliteration text: Laaraib lakab hai mere quran ke andar, Haider hu main haider
english translation text: Laaraib is my tittle mentioned in the quaran. I am Haider! I am Haider

urdu transliteration text:
Is baat ke kudrat hai fakat mere kalam main
Tasveer banata hu main madar ke shikham main
english translation text:
This is the power only in my hands
I can picture what is in a mothers woumb

urdu transliteration text:
Takhleek pe khaalik ne kiya mujko mukarrar
Haider hu main haider
english translation text:
Allah has given me the responsibility of creation
I am Haider! I am Haider

urdu transliteration text:
Jab qatal kiya jaao to main qatal na hunga
Sauw baar bhi maut aayige fir bhi na marunga
english translation text:
Even when killed I will not die
Even if death comes 100 times, I will not die

urdu transliteration text:
Baibus hai mere saamne ye maut ka chackar
Haider hu main haider
english translation text:
Death is helpless in front of me
I am Haider! I am Haider

urdu transliteration text:
Pohnche sare mairaaj e nabi jis ghadi logo
Bus haath milane ka waha izzn tha mujko
english translation text:
When the Prophet SAW reached the highest point of Meraj
My only desire was to shake his hand

urdu transliteration text:
Jee karta tha kehdoo main ye parde se nikal kar
Haider hu main haider
english translation text:
I wanted to reveal to him
I am Haider! I am Haider!

urdu transliteration text:
Maa ne kabhi marhab ke ye marhab se kaha tha
Tu lakh bahadur hai magar usse na ladna
english translation text:
A mother gave this loving advice to her loved one,
“May you fight several battles and die but make sure you don’t fight
the one...

urdu transliteration text:
Maidan main aajayi agar koi ye kehkar
Haider hu main haider
english translation text:
who comes to the battle field saying:
I am Haider! I am Haider

urdu transliteration text:
Tu kisko darate ho yu naam apne batake
Woh aur thi maidan se jo baag gayi thi
english translation text:
Who do you intend to scare with your name (strength)
There were others (cowards) like you who ran away from the battle field

urdu transliteration text:
Main aam sahabi nahi aayi marhabo antar
Haider hu main haider
english translation text:
I am no ordinary companion my friends
I am Haider! I am Haider

urdu transliteration text:
Jo logo samaj thi hai main wallah nahi hu
Tum jaan lo sab kuch hu main Allah nahi hu
english translation text:
I swear I’m not what people think I am
Know this; I am everything but Allah (swt)

urdu transliteration text:
Maabood hai Akbar woh mera khalike Akbar
Haider hu main haider
english translation text:
Divine Is the great one, my great creator
I am Haider! I am Haider
